nodes.title: Private Lessons:Classcl Guitar
nodes.description: Private lessons on primary instrument or voice for Music Majors with a concentration in Music Technology and Business who have not yet passed the Level II Examination. Prerequisite: Pre-Level II Exam Music major with declared Music Technology and Business concentration.
nodes.other_requirements: Private lessons on primary instrument or voice for Music Majors with a concentration in Music Technology and Business who have not yet passed the Level II Examination. Pre-Level II Exam Music major with declared Music Technology and Business concentration. Restricted to MUS5 (Music Technology & Business) majors who are preparing for Basic Performance Assessment.

nodes.title: Piano Proficiency I
nodes.description: Basic piano technique, harmonizing, and grand staff reading. Prerequisites: MUL 1111 or equivalent rudimentary keyboard skills and music reading ability; Music or Music Education majors or Instructor permission only.
nodes.prereq_expression: {"type": "OR", "operands": [{"type": "course", "code": "MUL 1111"}, {"type": "course", "code": "equivalent rudimentary keyboard skills and music reading ability"}]}
nodes.other_requirements: Music or Music Education majors or Instructor permission only.

nodes.title: Basic Private Lessons: Piano
nodes.description: Private lessons in basic instrumental or vocal skills for non-music majors. A meeting with the teacher is required to assess appropriate placement. May be repeated for credit. Lab fee required. Prerequisites: For piano: MUL 1111 or equivalent; audition required.
nodes.other_requirements: A meeting with the teacher is required to assess appropriate placement. Audition required. Lab fee required. Lab fee $555 per credit; Students should contact instructor for schedule information PACE students by permission and override.

nodes.title: Private Lessons:Classcl Guitar
nodes.description: Private instruction on an instrument/voice for Music minors. Subject to availability of staff. Lab fee required. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisites: Music minors; lesson audition required before enrollment confirmed.
nodes.other_requirements: Music minors; lesson audition required before enrollment confirmed; May be repeated for credit; Lab fee $460 per credit; Students should contact instructor for schedule information

nodes.title: Private Lessons:Conga/LatPrcsn
nodes.description: Private instruction on an instrument/voice for non-majors and non-minors. Contact department immediately after registering. Subject to availability of staff. Lab fee required. May be repeated for credit. Not open for credit to Music majors/minors. Prerequisite: Lesson audition required before enrollment confirmed.
nodes.other_requirements: Lesson audition required before enrollment confirmed. Non Music majors and minors; May be repeated for credit; Audition required before enrollment confirmed; Lab fee $555 per credit; Students should contact instructor for schedule information; PACE students by permission and override.

nodes.title: Senior Recital
nodes.description: The solo recital is the capstone performance experience for music majors. Repertoire for the recital will be chosen in consultation with the private lesson teacher and, where appropriate, the area head. Students should take MUL 4500 concurrently. Prerequisites: Music or Music Education majors only; Students must have performed on at least four Student Performance Recitals before they are eligible for this course.
nodes.other_requirements: Music or Music Education majors only; Students must have performed on at least four Student Performance Recitals before they are eligible for this course. MUS, MUSE majors only; Must pass Level IV Exam; Lab fee $260 per credit

nodes.title: Group Jazz Piano II
nodes.description: Exploration of topics including stride, modal comping, and chord substitution. Some review of concepts from MUL 2121. Prerequisites: MUL 2121; Music or Music Education majors or minors only.
nodes.other_requirements: Music or Music Education majors or minors only.

nodes.title: Piano Proficiency II
nodes.description: Functional piano skills for musicians. Scales, technique, harmonizing, sight reading, repertory. Prerequisites: MUL 2111 or equivalent determined by placement test; Music or Music Education majors or Instructor permission only.
nodes.other_requirements: Music or Music Education majors or Instructor permission only

nodes.title: Elec SecLessons:Conga/LatPrcsn
nodes.description: Private instruction for music majors on an elective, non- required secondary instrument/voice. Subject to staff availability. Lab fee required. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisite: Music majors; successful completion of Entrance Audition.
nodes.other_requirements: Music majors; successful completion of Entrance Audition. MUS, MUSE majors only; Lab fee $460 per credit.

nodes.title: Private Lessons:Classcl Guitar
nodes.description: Private instruction on an instrument/voice for Music majors. Lab fee required. Juried examinations generally every semester of study. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisites: Music majors; successful completion of Entrance Audition.
nodes.other_requirements: Music majors; MUS, MUSE majors only; Lab fee $260 per credit

nodes.title: Beginning Grp Lessons: Guitar
nodes.description: Group lessons at the beginning level in guitar. May not be counted toward the Music major or minor. May be taken up to three times for credit.
nodes.other_requirements: PACE students by permission and override.

nodes.title: Beginning Group Lessons: Piano
nodes.description: Group lessons at the beginning level in piano. May not be counted toward the Music major or minor, except for students concentrating in Music Technology and Business. May be taken a total of two times for credit.
nodes.other_requirements: MUS and MUSE majors only; PACE students by permission and override.

nodes.title: Private Lessons:Jazz Saxophone
nodes.description: Private instruction on an instrument/voice for Music majors. Lab fee required. Juried examinations every semester of study. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisites: Music majors; MUL 2500; and successful completion of Intermediate Performance Assessment.
nodes.other_requirements: Music majors; successful completion of Intermediate Performance Assessment; MUS, MUSE majors only; Must pass Intermediate Perf Assessment; May be repeated for credit; Lab fee $260 per credit.

nodes.title: Rqd Sec Lessons:Conga/LatPrcsn
nodes.description: Private instruction for Music majors on a required secondary instrument/voice. Subject to staff availability. Lab fee required. May be repeated for credit. Prerequisite: Music majors; successful completion of Entrance Audition.
nodes.other_requirements: Music majors; successful completion of Entrance Audition. MUSE (Music Education) majors only

nodes.title: Group Jazz Piano I
nodes.description: Introduction to jazz piano techniques, including rootless voicings, soloing, and comping; and covering basic chord progressions, blues, and standard tunes. Prerequisites: MUL 1111; or basic keyboard knowledge and Instructor permission.
